availability.p: This information may not be reproduced without the explicit permission from the copyright holder. For copyright information, please contact Deryle Lonsdale at lonz@byu.edu

notesStmt.note: There are two versions of the Ten Commandments in Romanized Lushootseed.

app.rdg: Decem Dei Mandata:
THE COMMANDMENTS OF GOD:
The Ten Commandments:
Decem Dei Mandata:
The ten commandments of God
Tih^ilh olob gwalh Sherk-Siam schelhrachem.
ti툾i톫 툾ulub g퉝톛톫 s팳톛q si툾ab sc팳톛톫x팳톛c팳톛b.
The Ten Commandments of God
1. Klob chor tlo ador rhol decho Sherhk Siam.
1. 'Tlob chahu tlo ador rol dcho Sherk-Siam.
1. 쿹'ub c팳톛x퉝 톫uador x팳퉝ul퉢 d톛c팳툾u s팳톛q si툾ab.
1. 쿹'ub c팳톛x퉝 톫uador x팳퉝ul퉢 d톛c팳툾u s팳톛q si툾ab.
콃i chorh tlemarhatleldu tsisk tsedelh.
Hoi chahu tlhba ratlelduh tsits ku tsid^ilh.
huy c팳톛x퉝 톫ub톛x팳a쿹'il퉢dx퉝 cick퉢퉝 c톛di톫.
huy c팳톛x퉝 톫톛b톛x팳a쿹'il퉢dx퉝 cick퉢퉝 c톛di톫.
2. Weorh degwe kwe tlas adsda adok p캐tl캒tlh k Sherk Siam.
2. Whe ahu dgwe kwi tla adsdaad aku pa'tla'tl ku Sherk-Siam.
2. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)adsda툾ad 툾톛 k퉝i p팻a쿹'a쿹' k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
2. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)adsda툾ad 툾톛 k퉝i p팻a쿹'a쿹' k퉝i s팳톛q si툾ab.
Klal bassista w캡 orh degwe tlas atsda ak patlatlh kwe l캐l캡 stam!
'Tlalba asista, whe ahu dgwe kwi tla adsdaad aku pa'tla'tl ku lale stab.
쿹'a톫'b톛툾톛s툾ist톛툾, x퉝i 툾ah톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫adsda툾ad 툾톛 k퉝i p팻a쿹'a쿹' k퉝i l톛li툾 stab.
쿹'a톫'b톛툾톛s툾ist톛툾, x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 쿹'adsda툾 툾톛 k퉝i p팻a쿹'a쿹' k퉝i l톛li툾 stab!
3. Alh kw캐ssasshoskrharha 캐ld캒t atas ooyud ts캡k twal di Sherk Siam!
3. Halh kwi tla adsashuts ku raraalhdat, ata adsohoyutsut tsoku dhual di Sherk-Siam.
3. ha툾톫 k퉝i 톫(u)ads톛shuyuts k퉝i x팳a툾x팳a툾톛톫dat, 툾톛 t톛 adshuyutcut c톛k퉢퉝 dx퉝툾al di s팳톛q si툾ab.
3. ha툾톫 k퉝i s톛shuys k퉝i x팳a툾x팳a툾톛톫dat, 툾톛 ti 툾톛shuyud cuk퉝 dx퉝툾al di s팳톛q si툾ab!
4. Degwe kwe tlas asshoss ta 캐ts gwa adban et캐 sk콄킗,
4. Halh dgwe kwi tla adsashuts, ta adsgwa adban etsa adskoi,
4. ha툾톫 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)ads톛s팳uuc ti adsg퉝a툾 adbad 툾i tsi adsk퉢퉝uy,
4. ha툾톫 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫ass팳uuc ti adsg퉝a툾 adbad 툾i ti sk퉢퉝uy,
Delh dogwe tlo darhul캡 ak ago.
dilh dgwe tla adahu helle aku haku.
di톫 d톛g퉝i 톫(u)a(d)d톛x퉝h톛li툾 툾톛 k퉝i ha툾k퉝.
di톫 d톛g퉝i 톫ud톛x퉝h톛li툾 툾톛 k퉝i ha툾k퉝.
5. W캡 orh degwe tlo gualalchorh.
5. Whe ahu dgwe kwi gwat tlo gulald chahu.
5. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i g퉝at 톫ug퉝톛lald c팳톛x퉝.
5. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i 톫ug퉝톛lald c팳톛x퉝.
Klal bassista weorh degwe kwe tlas rhoyalk
'Tlalba asista whe ahu dgwe kwi tla adsdohusroayalkreb.
쿹'al'b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)adsd톛x퉝sx퉝톛yalq톛b.
쿹'a톫'b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫asx팳퉝톛yalq.
6. W캡 orh dogwe kwi tlass siayus ak s캡킗lh.
6. Whe ahu dgwe kwi tla adsiayus aku seyeyilh.
6. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i톫(u)adsyayus 툾톛 k퉝i s톛y톛yi톫.
6. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫assyayus 툾톛 k퉝i s톛yi툾톫
Klal ba assista weorh degwe kwe tla's petedgwassem twal s캡킗lh.
'Tlalba asista whe ahu dgwe kwi tla adspet^edegwasseb dhual ku seyeyilh.
쿹'al퉢b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)adsp톛tidg퉝as톛b dx퉝툾al k퉝i s톛y톛yi톫.
쿹'al퉢b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 쿹'adsp톛tidg퉝as톛b dx퉝툾al s톛yi툾톫.
7. We orh dogwe kwe tlas kada,
7. Whe ahu dgwe kwi tla adskrada aku stab tolal gwat.
7. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)dsqada 툾톛 k퉝i stab tul퉢al g퉝at.
Klal baassista we orh dogwe kwe tlasrhu캡l캒l.
'Tlalba asista whe ahu dgwe kwi tla adsrwelaleku.
쿹'al'b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)adsx팳톛lal톛k퉝.
8. Weorh dogwe kw tlas 콞콄y캡malh
8. Whe ahu dgwe kwi tla adshohoyebalh.
8. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i톫(u)adsuhuy톛ba톫.
8. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫adsuhuyuba톫.
Klal bussista weorh degwe kwi tlasbedchem.
'Tlalba asista whe ahu dgwe kwi tla adsbedchib dhual ku stab.
쿹'al퉢b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)adsb톛dc팳톛b dx퉝툾al k퉝i stab.
쿹'al퉢b톛툾톛sist톛툾 x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫adsb톛dc팳톛b.
9. Weor degwe kwe tlas pet캡dgwassem twalh so콄igwas ak patlhatlh
9. Whe hahu dgwe kwi tla adspet^edegwasseb dhual soigwas aku pa'tla'tl,
9. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)adsp톛tidg퉝as톛b dx퉝툾al shuyg퉝as 툾톛 k퉝i p팻a쿹'a쿹',
9. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫adsp톛tidg퉝as톛b dx퉝툾al shuyg퉝as 툾톛 k퉝i p팻a쿹'a쿹',
Day캐킗 twal ksmali캡 kew tladrhach assut.
dayai dhual smalie tla adrach astsut.
day퉢ay dx퉝툾al smali톛 톫(u)adx팳톛c팳'팳ascut.
day퉢ay dx퉝툾al smali톛 쿹'(u)adx팳톛c팳'팳ascut.
10. Weorh degwe kwe tlas캡kwamed gwal l캐l캣 stam Rhelhte skada.
10. Whe ahu dgwe kwi tla adsekwabid gwalh lale stab relhte tla adskada.
10. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫(u)adshik퉝bid g퉝톛톫 l톛li? stab x팳톛lti 쿹'(u)adsqada.
10. x퉝i툾톛x퉝 d톛g퉝i k퉝i 톫ashik퉝bid g퉝톛톫 l톛li툾 stab x팳톛lti sqada.
